name: historical_notes
Alexandrian War: Compressed Alexandrian War: Caesar held the palace and harbor district with a small veteran force while Ptolemaic troops loyal to Ptolemy XIII fought through the city until relief arrived from Syria and Judaea.

name: ROMAN
column4: hold the palace quarter harbor installations and causeways until eastern relief can arrive
column5: preserve Caesar's foothold and Cleopatra's claim

name: EGYPTIAN
column4: use numbers city streets and harbor pressure to isolate Caesar's detachments
column5: drive the Romans out of Alexandria and restore Ptolemaic control
